title: Selecting a mirrored status column for an automation
excerpt: Is it possible to select a mirrored status column that’s pointing to a different board as an automation “status” option. In the picture I have attached you can see when I select the “status” automation option I can only …

posts.author: ETPTyler (Tyler Warnke)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is it possible to select a mirrored status column that’s pointing to a different board as an automation “status” option. In the picture I have attached you can see when I select the “status” automation option I can only add status columns that are not mirrored columns. in other words there should be another option however does not show up because its a mirrored column.

Problem1268×335 17 KB

posts.author: Jake_Gro (Jake Grossman)
posts.cookedHtml:
I use this and it works…

image1334×219 7.6 KB

posts.author: Admeirel (Adolpho Meirelles)
posts.cookedHtml:
For now it’s only possible with some pre-made status change automations - not with all of them and not with custom automations.

It would be nice if someone in the monday team had a pipeline for this feature.

posts.author: peta (Peta Bolger)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @ETPTyler

If you’re interested in exploring some options, there are plenty of partners out there who can help. Check out the Hire An Expert section for a look around.

I’d be happy to have a conversation with you about your use of the platform and your use case, any issues you’re facing in addition to this etc. Sometimes it can help just to talk it all out in one go and see what you’re looking at overall. Please check out our website and let me know if you want to set up a meeting - no obligations at any point

Alternatively, feel free to book straight into my calendar here.

Thanks and kind regards,
Peta - Account Executive at upstream

posts.author: julienredhouse (Julien)
posts.cookedHtml: I can’t find this mirror column anywhere. Is it a features developped by you or someone else? I might be interested.

posts.author: Jake_Gro (Jake Grossman)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello. So I have two boards set up with a mirror column. I use this recipe from the “Status Change” section of automations. Once the mirror has been set up, I can select the mirror status as one of my options under “when status changes…” This says it also supports subitems.

posts.author: ETPTyler (Tyler Warnke)
posts.cookedHtml: That’s where I am stuck, mine must be set up wrong somehow because it still does not show up. I will try and make sure my mirror column is correct.

posts.author: julienredhouse (Julien)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks for replying so quick
The same as @ETPTyler , I’ve tried several times but it doesn’t appear. @Jake_Gro what license do you have: pro or entreprise? Does someone from monday staff implemented an integration for your company?

posts.author: BNBLEATHER (BNB)
posts.cookedHtml: I am also stuck, did you ever get this to work?

posts.author: BNBLEATHER (BNB)
posts.cookedHtml: I worked it out if you still have not. go to automatuions and type in 280, will give you correct recipe, why no one told me this I have no idea.

posts.author: NGladun (Nadiya)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello @ETPTyler, I am facing the same issue (2 years later than your original post). Have you found a solution?

posts.author: NGladun (Nadiya)
posts.cookedHtml: @Jake_Gro this ‘Mirror’ option does not come up in my automation recipe options. Any ideas why I wouldn’t have it?

posts.author: NGladun (Nadiya)
posts.cookedHtml: @BNBLEATHER Does it only pick up default Statuses? In my case, the column remains ‘invisible’ on the recipe formula and it I just choose default ‘status’ column (which I do not even have on my board), it shows me only default values, not the status values I have in my mirror column
